results.title: April 2026 Economic and Market Update: Geopolitics at the Forefront - Crestwood Advisors
Geopolitical Risk Brief: April 2026 | S&P Global
International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
Why the stock market is hitting records despite Iran war
Markets Update April 2026 - Despite geopolitical risks: Markets are proving resilient

summary: US-Iran conflict escalated in late Feb/early March with Strait of Hormuz closed by Iranian forces (March 4). US blockade of Iranian ports initiated April 13. Brent briefly above $100/bbl. Saudi Arabia/UAE rerouted oil via overland pipelines and IEA coordinated emergency stock release. Markets proved resilient — S&P 500 hit record highs despite conflict. IMF forecasts global growth 3.1% baseline. S&P 500 Q1 2026 earnings growth tracking +13.2% YoY (6th consecutive double-digit quarter).
